rationale: Monitor not cleared on Topology close; resource leak and event loop blockage, no specific spec rule violated.
Compression options not propagating due to legacy ReplSet/Mongos not applying connect options; internal implementation bug.
Internal options validator code quality fix; using hasOwnProperty. No spec rule involved.
readConcern at operation level only applied to find, not all read operations; spec requires it on all reads.
Internal refactor separating options validation from default application; no spec behavior changed.
BulkWrite batch-size calculation underestimates BSON size; internal calculation bug, no spec rule cited.
Refactor wire protocol methods to reuse command internally; no behavior change, no spec rule violated.
Collation applied before decorateWithCollation call; internal sequencing bug without a specific cited spec rule.
User support ticket about MongoNetworkError ECONNREFUSED; server-side data corruption, not a driver bug.
Connection string spec requires warning on unknown options; driver silently ignores unrecognized URI options.
Node process crash in bulk.execute due to null session object; internal crash, no spec rule violated.
Internal refactor to use new wire protocol code paths in unified topology; no behavior change.
Removing mutation of user-owned objects; API ergonomics improvement, no spec rule involved.
Refactoring OP_QUERY instances in auth providers to use command method; internal cleanup, no spec violation.
Invalid collection name error thrown instead of passed to callback; internal error-handling bug, no spec rule.
Overriding validateOptions with validationLevel in MongoClient; internal API ergonomics, no spec rule.
Handling deprecated option aliases with deprecation messages; internal API improvement, no spec rule.
makeLazyLoader breaks Webpack bundling due to dynamic require path; packaging/bundling issue, no spec involvement.
Refactor to prevent multiple rounds of options validation causing spurious unknown-option warnings; internal refactor.
Flattening wire protocol class hierarchy into functions; internal architecture refactor, no spec behavior change.
CURSOR_NOT_FOUND flag value is wrong; OP_REPLY spec documentation specifies value must be 1.
BSON serialization options not propagated through options management; internal options handling improvement.
Spec-compliant URI parser passes unsupported readConcern option through, overwriting internal readConcern object.
Race condition causing duplicate connections in pool, leading to stalled queries; internal concurrency bug, no spec rule.
Wire protocol classes accept arrays but should expect single command; internal assumption cleanup, no spec violation.
TypeError when error event fires on change stream cursor while closing; internal race condition, no spec rule cited.
Large bulk operations (>100k) silently drop some operations due to maxWriteBatchSize handling bug; internal calculation.
ssl=true in URI is ignored; connection-string spec requires URI options to be honored including ssl.
Documentation example has typo in resumeAfter usage; docs bug only, no driver behavior involved.
Connection string option names not normalized; spec requires case-insensitive option handling to prevent duplicate option bugs.
Improvement ticket to deprecate parallelCollectionScan per DRIVERS-562 spec coordination; proactive spec rollout, not a bug.
Refactoring Connection to be shared with mock server for OP_MSG testing; test infrastructure improvement.
useNewUrlParser fails to propagate ssl options, causing X.509 auth to fail; spec-compliant URI parser drops required auth options.
Malformed URI credentials cause uncatchable exception; error propagation bug, not a spec-defined behavior violation.
Moving handshake logic from Server topology to connection initialization; internal architecture refactor.
Removing dead authentication code from pool and topologies; internal cleanup, no spec behavior change.
Removing unnecessary authentication logic from connection pool; internal refactor with no behavior change.
countDocuments aggregation uses _id: null; changed to _id: 1 for cross-language test runner compatibility. No spec rule cited.
Deprecated new Buffer() in bson@1; security/performance dependency issue, no spec rule involved.
BSON v4 ObjectIDs silently ignored by Node driver using BSON v1; library version interop issue, no spec rule violated.
Sessions-related methods moved out of pool for architectural separation; internal refactor, no spec behavior change.
Wrong JS const scoping in db_ops.js causes ReferenceError in some bundlers; language-binding implementation bug.
Skip sharding transaction tests for MongoDB < 4.1.5; test guard for version-incompatible spec tests.
Refactoring insertMany to remove resultMutator for Command Refactor work; internal code cleanup.
Publishing pre-built native addon binaries via node-pre-gyp; build/packaging improvement, no spec involvement.
BulkWrite batch-size underestimated when documents contain undefined values; internal BSON size calculation bug.
Spec quoted: isMaster handshake MUST be performed on every socket; driver only does it on first connection.
Driver authenticates against arbiter nodes; SDAM spec requires drivers not to treat arbiters as data-bearing servers.
Arbiter nodes accumulating unbounded connections in v3.2.1; connection management regression, no specific spec rule cited.
SyntaxError from async generator function syntax incompatible with Node.js v8; language compatibility/packaging issue.
